title: Devon's Dungeon Dice
description: This datapack adds multiplayer compatible dice that will aid in hosting tabletop RPG's and other dice-related gaming experiences in Minecraft.
body:
This datapack adds multiplayer compatible dice that will aid in hosting tabletop RPG's and other dice-related gaming experiences in Minecraft.

To obtain the different dice (and coin), you'll have to interact with a nitwit villager. Right-click a nitwit with one of the following materials to obtain the corresponding game piece:

1) Copper ingot --> Coin (D2)
2) Red Dye --> D4
3) Blue Dye --> D6
4) Black Dye --> D8
5) Orange Dye --> D10
6) Lime Dye --> D12
7) Yellow Dye --> D20
8) Purple Dye --> D100

The game piece will be crafted a few seconds after right-clicking as the nitwit "crafts" the item. 

To use a die, right-click. The result of the roll will be broadcasted to all players within an 80 block radius. IE: "Devonsdesk rolled a 6". The result will also be bolded and golden if a player rolls the highest possible result, like a '20' on a 20-sided dye.
